title: Orochi’s Rage and Komurasaki’s Defiance
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Sanji as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Sanji, Robin, Nami, and others move through the capital as Orochi’s obsession with Komurasaki turns violent.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hmmm MMM!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Where'd he go!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He... vanished?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Guava aaaaaa AAGGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Such power!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Huh!? Where'd he come from!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He must be moving faster than our eyes can see!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's not it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was written in the news- papers I used to read...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There was a comic strip called "The Warrior of the Sea: SORA".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The evil army, Germa 66, were the antagonists in it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One of their members was "stealth Black"...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A trouble- some man who was able to disappear at Will!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Sssswww...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's able to blend in perfectly with any environ-ment...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: and become invisible to the human eye!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You know way too much about it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...what's up with this suit!? Did it just make me invisible!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So, the clear-clear fruit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Allows its user to turn invisible in

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: there was a time in which... I dreamed of becoming an invisible man!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have met the man who consumed the clear-clear fruit...! You are responsible for crushing one of my lifelong dreams!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My crushed dream... has been revitalized by the German science that I always despised...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: How Ironic!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, this power will surely be use- full! For peeping on a woman's bat- no, no...I'm helping my crew!! Boy, what a dilemma....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The capels my shield. On my heels, there's an accelerate; iron device. On my soles, a flotation device.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And on top of all that, it's got TRANSPARENGY!! So this is what a raid suit is capable of doing, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: AN INVISIBLE HUMAN...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is getting weirder and weirder... who exactly are you!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Show me who you really are!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Whoa!! Sanji, are you all right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: As ex- pected of an Ancient 20AN.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I felt a little pain, but this suit is definitely durable!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...at this rate, the capital won't hold out much longer...

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 35 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
